title: Turkish Wrap with Scamorza Cheese and Cozy Filling
description: Indulge in a delicious French-inspired Turkish wrap with melted scamorza cheese and a cozy filling. A perfect snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Cozy filling (mix of chopped mushrooms, onions, garlic, and herbs)

instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Place the wrap in the pan and toast for 1-2 minutes.
Spread the cozy filling on the wrap.
Place the scamorza cheese on top of the filling.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling and cheese.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the wrap is crispy.
